description: Model Context Protocol server for DeepSeek's advanced language models

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Restrict tool capabilities to the minimum required. Audit each declared permission (exec, network, db, fs) and remove any not strictly necessary.

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'DeepSeekApiError' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.

findings.title: DoS Resilience — Missing Rate Limit / Timeout
findings.description: tool performs network or execution operations but declares no rate-limit, timeout, or retry configuration
findings.recommendation: Declare explicit rate-limit, timeout, and retry configuration for all network and execution tools. Implement exponential back-off and surface resource state to the calling agent.
